tips.title: Override trip type when needed
tips.description: If GeoPulse guessed the wrong movement type, open trip details and override it with the correct one.

tips.title: See why a trip was classified this way
tips.description: Use the "Why this classification?" action on a trip to inspect speeds and decision signals used by GeoPulse.

tips.title: Enable bicycle, running, and train detection
tips.description: Tune trip classification thresholds from Timeline Preferences to improve mode detection for your activity profile.

tips.title: Become an admin on your instance
tips.description: Set GEOPULSE_ADMIN_EMAIL in {code}.env{code} to your account email, restart GeoPulse, then sign out and sign back in.

tips.title: Add friends and choose sharing permissions
tips.description: Invite friends from the Friends page and choose whether they can see timeline history, live location, or both.

tips.title: Turn data gaps into meaningful stays
tips.description: Configure gap-stay inference so overnight or stationary gaps become stays instead of blank data gaps.
